title: dioscorea campestris
intro: Dioscorea campestris, also known as Chinese wild yam, is a species of flowering plant in the yam family Dioscoreaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea campestris include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Dioscorea campestris can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
